title: Bartoline Teak Oil 500 ml – Deep Penetrating Wood Oil for Outdoor & Indoor Furniture | Garden Furniture, Hardwood Protection & Teak Care (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
RESTORES & PROTECTS WOOD: Specially formulated to replenish natural oils lost through weathering and wear, keeping wood nourished and protected. Ideal for teak, oak, and other hardwoods.

PERFECT FOR GARDEN & INDOOR FURNITURE: Provides long-lasting protection and enhances the natural beauty of outdoor garden furniture, decking, and interior wooden surfaces with a traditional matt finish.
DEEP PENETRATING & WATER-RESISTANT: Soaks deep into the wood grain for superior protection against moisture, UV rays, and general aging, preventing cracking and drying out.
EASY APPLICATION & QUICK ABSORPTION: Simply apply with a clean cloth or brush, rubbing it in well. For the best results, apply 2-3 coats with 24-hour intervals for deep conditioning.
SAFE & EASY CLEANUP: After application, clean tools with Bartoline White Spirit. Dispose of used cloths safely, as they may self-ignite if left unattended.
